# 50 m altitude floor on goto_pixel and goto_waypoint

`REQ-altitude-floor`

| kind | status |
|---|---|
| requirement | draft |

The executor shall enforce a minimum commanded altitude of 50 m AGL on every goto_pixel and goto_waypoint command, silently raising any lower value. The floor applies only in the executor; loiter commands carry their own altitude and are not subject to this floor.

**Rationale.** Prevents the VLM from issuing a ground-strike command by misreading altitude from the prompt.

**Fit criterion.** `Executor._goto_waypoint contains `alt = max(alt, 50)`; loiter and fly_waypoints do not.`

**Verification method:** inspection · **priority:** shall · **verification status:** passing
